chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6267 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.26629/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.26630/2021 (Ex/A). 3. For orders on Misc. No.26631/2021 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 25.10.2021. Mr. Faiz Durrani, advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Dismissed, as not pressed by the learned counsel. 4. Learned counsel states that a large number of petitions, including petition bearing C.P. No.D-4943/2021, were filed before this Court, which were decided against the petitioners, vide judgment dated 10.10.2021 (a copy whereof is placed by him, which is taken on record). He states that against the said judgment the petitioners, in those petitions are proposing to file CPLA before the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan. He states that the instant petition may also be disposed of in the same manner as decided in the above referred petitions so that the present petitioner could also file CPLA before the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG present in some other matter, has waived notice and has given no objection, if this petition is also disposed of in the same manner as decided in C.P No.D-4943/2021 and others. Heard and perused the record. In view of the submissions made by the learned counsel for the petitioner as well as AAG, the instant petition stands disposed of in the same manner as decided in the above referred petitions.

Heard and perused the record. In view of the submissions made by the learned counsel for the petitioner as well as AAG, the instant petition stands disposed of in the same manner as decided in the above referred petitions. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
